text:
> … i386

(In reply to monochromec from comment #5, 2016)

> … 64 bit …

(In reply to Otacílio de Araújo Ramos Neto from comment #8, 2018)

Reproducible with 6.1.46 on greater on FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE?

The package message was improved in 2021; please ensure that the required virtual graphics controller is set before starting the guest.
